questions.stem: Which body within the EU has the sole right to propose legislation?
questions.explanation: The European Commission has the sole right of legislative initiative in most policy areas. The Parliament and Council act as co-legislators.

questions.stem: Under the Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations (1961), which of the following is NOT a category of diplomatic agent?
questions.explanation: The Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations recognizes three classes: ambassadors/nuncios, envoys/ministers, and charges d'affaires. Consuls are governed by the separate 1963 Vienna Convention on Consular Relations.

questions.stem: Which UN conference framework oversees global climate negotiations?
questions.explanation: The UNFCCC (UN Framework Convention on Climate Change) is the treaty body under which COP meetings and the Paris Agreement operate. IPCC produces scientific assessments but does not negotiate.

questions.stem: How many permanent members does the UN Security Council have?
questions.explanation: The UN Security Council has 5 permanent members (P5): USA, UK, France, Russia, and China. They each hold veto power. The Council also has 10 non-permanent rotating members.

questions.stem: Article 5 of the North Atlantic Treaty establishes:

options.A: The right of member states to maintain nuclear arsenals
options.C: The structure of NATO's military command
options.D: The procedure for admitting new members

questions.explanation: Article 5 states that an armed attack against one member is considered an attack against all members — the collective defense clause. Article 10 covers membership admission.
